factory_owns: completion audit and Receipt Five preparation
user_must_not_do: decide method internals without a bounded approval request
approval_points: Product SOT approval when material scope is unresolved
architecture approval when risk or cost is material
access approval when credentials or accounts are required
release approval for production or irreversible promotion
final acceptance after evidence and review
handoff_mode: compressed operator view with understanding, bounded decisions, blockers, proof and next action
blocked_state_policy: stop with a named blocker, owner, evidence needed and smallest safe next action instead of pushing open-ended work to the user

factory_work: classify input and start source resolution

allowed_user_work: approve or reject material scope and risk decisions
factory_work: create Product SOT, route methods, research and plans
route workers, run checks, capture evidence and review

allowed_user_work: approve high-risk release or risk acceptance
factory_work: prepare promotion evidence, rollback and monitoring
reconcile Receipt Five and completion audit

surface_map.normal_user_view: bounded approval request with scope, risk and evidence
